CourseRequest.title: CourseRequest
CourseRequest.description: Represents a student's access request for a premium AI course

userId.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the student

userEmail.description: The email address of the student

courseId.description: The custom string ID of the course requested

courseTitle.description: The title of the requested course

status.description: The current verification and activation status of the request

requestedAt.description: The timestamp when the request was made

ActivationKey.title: ActivationKey
ActivationKey.description: Represents a generated unique subscription license key/code

status.description: Whether the key has been claimed

claimedByEmail.description: The email of the student who claimed the key

claimedByUid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the student who claimed the key

claimedAt.description: Timestamp when the key was claimed

course_requests/{requestId}.description: Collection tracking student payment and activation course requests
